allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(m['name'], round\(m['size']/1e9,1\),'GB'\) for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/run -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"request": "write a file called hello.txt containing the text Hello from aihomeserver!"}')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process aihomeserver -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name; Stop-Process -Name aihomeserver -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'done'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'done'")
